messages.checkin:
Hey! Quick daily check-in.

Please reply with your hours and what you worked on, separated by a `|`:

*hours* `|` *what you worked on*

For example:
• `6 hours | dashboard redesign`
• `6h | fixed login bug`
• `half day | code review`
messages.reminder: Hey, just a reminder to send in your daily update when you get a chance!
messages.confirmation: Thanks! Your update has been logged.
messages.format_help:
